summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ticksy attendance tracking app. Core functionality working well with some data persistence issues in slot assignment workflow.

integration_issues.issue: Student assignment buttons not consistently appearing on slots page
Created slots sometimes not persisting or displaying consistently across sessions

passed_tests: Login with demo@ticksy.app / Demo1234! redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard shows 'Hey there!' greeting and today's date (Wednesday, April 15, 2026)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Students, Slots, Calendar) works correctly
Students page: 'Add Student' button opens dialog and creates students successfully
Slots page: 'Add Slot' button opens dialog and creates Wednesday slots
Created Wednesday slots appear in Dashboard 'Today's Slots' section
Calendar page: student selector dropdown displays and functions correctly
Calendar page: calendar component renders properly with legend
Logout functionality redirects to landing page correctly
All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Protected routes redirect properly when not authenticated
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix slot assignment workflow - ensure assign buttons appear consistently and student assignment to slots persists properly. Investigate slot data persistence issues across user sessions.
